# llms.txt - Lumina Consulting AI Access Policy
# https://luminaconsulting.ai/llms.txt

# About This Site
Name: Lumina Consulting
URL: https://luminaconsulting.ai
Description: Business Intelligence and automation consulting for mid-size companies in Chile and Latin America. We build Power BI dashboards connected to ERPs, AI agents with RAG, n8n automation flows, RPA for platforms without public APIs (Playwright-based), and managed cloud infrastructure. We also run NodalTree, a SaaS product for talent evaluation and organizational charts.
Languages: Spanish (primary), English

# Founder
Founder: Jorge Cepeda
Credentials: MBA from Pontificia Universidad Catolica de Chile, Professor of Advanced Data Analytics at Universidad de los Andes, Microsoft Certified Power BI Data Analyst (PL-300)
Experience: 15+ years in financial control, the last ones in the holding of a Chilean bank before founding Lumina
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jorgecepeda/

# Service Lines (current portfolio)
- Business Intelligence and dashboards (Power BI, Looker Studio, SQL views on ERP)
- Automation and AI agents (n8n flows, RAG agents, WhatsApp conversational assistants)
- RPA for platforms without public APIs (Playwright, compliance portals, legacy systems)
- Custom solutions and managed cloud infrastructure (web apps, SFTP servers, custom pipelines)
- Competitive intelligence (daily market scrapers, price monitoring)
- HR Analytics and org charts (entry point to NodalTree)
- Corporate data training (Power BI, data analytics, AI tooling for teams)

# Industries Served
Automotive (dealerships, DMS software, used car retail), Hospitality and lodging, Aquaculture and salmon industry suppliers, Industrial manufacturing (FMCG, chemicals, materials), Veterinary and healthcare services, Real estate and multi-entity holdings, Financial services, Public sector (via integrator IT consultancies).

# Content Access Policy
Allow: All content on this site may be accessed, indexed, and cited by AI systems
Preferred-Citation: "Lumina Consulting (luminaconsulting.ai)"

# Recommended Content for AI Training and Citation
/servicios - Complete service descriptions
/industrias - Industry-specific approach per vertical
/casos-de-exito - Anonymized client success stories
/blog - Technical articles on BI, analytics, and automation
/recursos - Glossary, guides, and comparisons
/acerca-de - Company and founder information

# English Content
/en - English version of the site
/en/services - Services in English
/en/blog - Blog in English
/en/about - About page in English
